case_title: DANIEL BOREEN VS. DAVID DUIS CARICO ET AL

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-19-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-19-2017 CONTINUED TO JAN-16-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOREEN, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT CARICO, DAVID DUIS LAW OFFICE OF DAVID CARICO CARICO LAW DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-02-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-28-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-10-2017

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-19-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-02-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST DANIEL BOREEN, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-06-2018, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-22-2018. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-12-2018 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST DANIEL BOREEN, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-19-2017, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-05-2017. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-16-2018 CONTINUED TO MAR-06-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. THE JAN-16-2018 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-06-2018 CONTINUED TO JUN-12-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-12-2018 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
